ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geographical_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical area */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the area */,
  "area_in_meters" REAL /* Area size represented in square meters */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level indicating the accuracy of the data (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Geometrical representation of the area in WKT format */,
  "plus_code" TEXT /* Plus code representing the area location */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for the area */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category for the area */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the area */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the area */,
  "environmental_metrics" TEXT /* Additional environmental metrics related to the area */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Indicates whether the area complies with environmental regulations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographical_areas_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographical_areas_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES area_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographical_areas_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographical_areas_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., satellite, survey) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the data source */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the data source */,
  "reliability" REAL /* Reliability of the data source (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "area_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., protected area, urban area) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the category */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for visual representation on maps */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_categories_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_categories_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographical area being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the area */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the area was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access request */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES geographical_areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
